driver_subject: crypto: bcm/des - switch to new verification routines
kernel_subject: crypto: des/3des_ede - add new helpers to verify keys
stage1_reason: Driver switches from direct DES weak key checking to using new kernel verification routines (verify_ablkcipher_des_key, verify_ablkcipher_des3_key, etc.) and changes include from crypto/des.h to crypto/internal/des.h.
stage2_reason: Kernel commit adds new verification helpers (verify_ablkcipher_des_key, verify_ablkcipher_des3_key, etc.) that driver commit explicitly switches to, matching driver's include change from crypto/des.h to crypto/internal/des.h.
